plan.description: Read package.json. Identify the outdated dependency: axios 0.21.1 has a known security vulnerability (CVE). Read all source files to find where axios is imported and used.
Update axios from 0.21.1 to 1.6.0 in package.json. Check if the API changed (response.data is still the pattern in v1.x). Update any imports if needed.
Check if lodash 4.17.20 should be updated (4.17.21 has a prototype pollution fix). Update it in package.json if needed.
Write a CHANGELOG.md entry documenting the dependency updates with the security rationale.

initialState.task: Scan and update vulnerable dependencies in a Node.js project. Focus on security-relevant updates.

assertions.description: Old axios version should be gone
